CustomField.description: This field displays comma separated asset serial numbers associated with this contract. For operating lease, it displays the asset selected on the 'Asset' field and for non lease agreements it displays the assets selected on the Asset Transaction related list.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field displays comma separated asset serial numbers associated with this contract. For operating lease, it displays the asset selected on the 'Asset' field and for non lease agreements it displays the assets selected on the Asset Transaction related list.
CustomField.label: Associated Asset(s)
